findings.UAS_saturation_layer8: CONFIRMED - All features at layer 8 show UAS=1.0 (ceiling effect)
findings.measurement_limitation: UAS-based Chanin protocol fails to distinguish absorbed from non-absorbed at layer 8
findings.layer_specificity_needed: Need to test other layers (4, 6, 10) for UAS variance

note: Critical measurement limitation discovered. Layer 8 saturation explains null results in prior iterations.
